reasoning: The reference price for 2025-11-23 (a Sunday) corresponds to the November 21 close of $226.18. This price represents a near-bottom in the stock's recent three-month range (which has fluctuated between $224 and $268). Given that CRM has suffered a steep ~13% decline over the previous three weeks, technical mean reversion suggests a solid likelihood of a short-term bounce above $226.18. Furthermore, the baseline YFinance statistical model outputs a 0.55–0.61 probability of being above this threshold. I place the November 30 probability slightly elevated at 0.56 to reflect this likely short-term rebound. As we look further ahead past Q3 earnings (scheduled for December 3), there is greater uncertainty relating to CRM's fundamental headwinds (e.g., spending slowdowns and AI competition) and broader market conditions. Therefore, per the instructions to increase uncertainty and pull towards 0.50 as the horizon extends, I have tapered the estimates to 0.54 for December 23 and 0.52 for February 2026.
